title: HackTheBox — Busqueda: Full Walkthrough & Git Credential Abuse
summary: Complete walkthrough of HackTheBox Busqueda. Covers exploiting a SSTI vulnerability in Searchor, pivoting via Git credentials leaked in a config file, and escalating to root by abusing a sudoers entry for a Gitea admin script.

title: Active Directory Attack Path: From Domain User to Domain Admin in 20 Minutes
summary: Step-by-step breakdown of an AD attack chain discovered during an internal engagement: AS-REP Roasting → Kerberoasting → Pass-the-Hash → DCSync. All tooling is explained and detection bypasses are noted.

title: Bypassing WAFs with HTTP Request Smuggling — A Practical Guide
summary: Practical guide to exploiting HTTP/1.1 desync vulnerabilities to bypass WAF controls on major CDN providers. Includes automated detection methodology and PoC code.

title: AMSI Bypass Techniques in 2024 — Still Working (and Why)
summary: Survey of current AMSI bypass techniques: memory patching, reflection-based bypasses, and PowerShell downgrade attacks. Tested against Windows Defender December 2023 signatures.

title: SSRF to Internal Cloud Metadata: Bug Bounty Case Study
summary: How I turned a blind SSRF into IAM credential theft via AWS metadata endpoint. Covers the full discovery-to-report process including filter bypass techniques used.
